title: Intense Winey Norwegian Broccoli Bowl
description: A hearty, low-carb Norwegian dish featuring steamed broccoli and a rich wine sauce, perfect for a post-workout meal.

ingredients.name: red wine
ingredients.notes: dry, such as merlot or cabernet

instructions: In a large pot, bring 2 inches of water to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer and place a steamer basket over the water.
Add the broccoli to the steamer basket and cover with a lid, steaming for 5 minutes or until tender.
In a small saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat, then add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the red wine to the saucepan and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, until the sauce has reduced slightly.
Stir in the salt and black pepper to taste.
To assemble the bowls, divide the steamed broccoli between four lacquerware bowls.
Drizzle the wine sauce over the broccoli, then top with crumbled norwegian goat cheese and chopped fresh parsley.
